title: urostigma rufum
intro: Urostigma rufum, also known as the red stinkwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is primarily found in tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Urostigma rufum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections, among other uses. Urostigma rufum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
